scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/tui run build && pnpm -C packages/cli run build && pnpm -C packages/sdk run build && pnpm -C packages/create-clara-app run build && pnpm -C packages/ai run build && pnpm -C packages/agent run build && pnpm -C packages/coding-agent run build && pnpm -C packages/mom run build && pnpm -C frontend run build && pnpm -C packages/pods run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,mom,frontend,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,white,green,magenta" "cd packages/ai && npm run dev" "cd packages/agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/coding-agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/mom && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd packages/tui && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd packages/ai && npm run dev:tsc" "cd frontend && npm run dev:tsc"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && tsgo --noEmit && pnpm -C backend run type-check && npm run check:browser-smoke && cd frontend && npm run check
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && shx rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
